prerequisites.value: Ability to cast a summon monster spell.

description.value:
**Benefit:** For each spell level 1â9, select two creatures from the list below. You then add these creatures to the summon monster table of the same level, allowing you to summon them with the appropriate summon monster spell. Once made, these choices can’t be changed.

**Special:** You can take this feat multiple times. Each time you do, you can select two more monsters from the table below to add to the summon monster table of the same level. 1st Level Antelope * ( herd animal ) Baboon * (primate) Badger * Great horned owl * Kangaroo * (marsupial) Snapping turtle * Stingray * Thylacine * (marsupial) Trumpeter swan * Vulture * 2nd Level Camel * ( herd animal ) Compsognathus * ( dinosaur ) Dimorphodon * ( dinosaur ) Gar * Giant gecko * ( lizard ) Giant tortoise * Giant weasel * Manta ray * Ram * ( herd animal ) Stag * ( herd animal ) 3rd Level Arbiter ( inevitable ) Augur ( kyton ) Axe beak * Azer Bull Tripurasura ( asura ) Velociraptor ( dinosaur ) Voidworm ( protean ) 4th Level Crysmal Dimetrodon * ( dinosaur ) Dire weasel * D’ziriak Foo lion Giant seahorse * Giant skunk * Giant vulture * Giraffe ( protean ) Pairaka ( div ) Shoggti ( qlippoth ) Theletos ( aeon ) Tylosaurus ( dinosaur ) 7th Level Avoral ( agathion ) Behemoth hippopotamus * Contract devil Ghawwas ( div ) Giant anaconda * ( snake ) Giant snapping turtle * Kalavakus ( demon ) Leukodaemon ( daemon ) Movanic deva ( angel ) Nyogoth ( qlippoth ) Piscodaemon ( daemon ) Sacristan ( kyton ) Shield archon Upasunda ( asura ) Whale * 8th Level Aghasura ( asura ) Baregara Basilosaurus * ( megafauna ) Chernobue ( qlippoth ) Coloxus ( demon ) Diplodocus * ( dinosaur ) Interlocutor ( kyton ) Kolyarut ( inevitable ) Leonal ( agathion ) Meladaemon ( daemon ) Monadic deva ( angel ) Omox ( demon ) Shira ( div ) Spinosaurus * ( dinosaur ) 9th Level Augnagar ( qlippoth ) Couatl Great white whale * Sepid ( div ) Storm giant Tarry demodand Valkyrie * This creature is summoned with the celestial template if you are good and the fiendish template if you are evil. If you are neutral, you can choose which template to apply to the creature. This summoned creature has an alignment that matches yours, regardless of its usual alignment. Summoning this creature makes the summoning spell’s type match your alignment.
